//--------------------------------------------
// NOTE: The coffee and tea scenes use different control codes than the regular text.
// 00    = End of text (needs to be at the very end)
// 01 XX = Move the text horizontally over to position XX
// 08 XX = Print character name XX
// 09    = Drop down one line
//--------------------------------------------
// COFFEE SCENE
//--------------------------------------------
